name: Baked Apple Microwave
recipeIngredient: 1 Apple, about 8 oz, cored and peeled
recipeInstructions:
1. Core and peel each apple.
2. Place each apple in an individual glass casserole dish.
3. Fill the center of each apple with raisins.
4. Pour juice over the raisins.
5. Sprinkle each apple with cinnamon and nutmeg.
6. Cover with wax paper.
7. Microwave on high for about 2 minutes per apple (CHECK - your apples could be different) until tender.
8. Serve warm.
Estimated cost per serving: about 63 cents, allowing 50 cents for the apple.
